joinDescription: Pro unlocks global ladders, cloud backup, and rank telemetry.
proFeatureLeaderboard: Live global ladders — metric shards, cached reads, lower Firestore cost.
proFeatureCloudSync: Cloud backup slot for scores and history on your Firebase project.
proFeatureArena: Rank telemetry — best-score uploads, hourly caps per shard.
identityRequired: Sign in with Google to bind Arena identity across devices.
googleLoginFail: Complete Google sign-in to continue. Allow pop-ups if the window doesn't appear.
billingUnavailable: Subscription unavailable. Check RevenueCat keys and product mapping.
betaOpenAccess: Beta active: leaderboard open to all users.
identityOptionalBeta: Beta: no subscription required. Google sign-in still required for leaderboard.
betaNoLoginNeeded: No subscription in beta (Google sign-in required)
subscribeSuccess: Pro channel opening — heading to ladder.
coreRequired: Core unlock required before Arena uplink can bind.
disclaimer: Production billing ties to your storefront; this web shell simulates entitlement after Core ownership.
coreGateBody: Core unlock required — assessment, radar, and history stay local without Arena fees.
